violations.text: Chowder, noodles, etc. were observed held at 116 and 117 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Several food items (soups, prepared foods, desserts, etc.) on display and for self-service observed lacking an ingredient list. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit and vent (dishwashing room) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
The walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The lactic acid concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the lactic acid must be (704-1875) ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (immersion blender) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Moved to warewashing area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024

The walls behind soda line(back storage) and floors drains under counters have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Raw animal foods (such as raw beef short ribs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as red wine sauce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service called during inspection. Proof of repair to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
Red wine sauce was observed cooling covered. Container was opened to allow proper air flow during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets for 3 door lowboy were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2024
Water filter near soda syrups observed leaking. System to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
Vent by the pot washer was observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2023
